title: Pablo Valenzuela
text:
I work in the SEG research group at the University of Bern, Switzerland, supervised by Prof. Timo Kehrer and Emeritus Prof. Oscar Nierstrasz. Previously, I completed my master’s and bachelor’s degrees at the Universidad de La Frontera, Chile.
My research interests include software maintenance and evolution, mining software repositories, and empirical software engineering.

title: Publications
text: Valenzuela-Toledo, Pablo, and Alexandre Bergel. 2022. “Evolution of GitHub Action Workflows.” In 2022 IEEE International Conference on Software Analysis, Evolution and Reengineering (SANER), 123–27. IEEE.
